sections.name: About Us
sections.copy:
About Blessed Gift Insurance Brokers Limited

Blessed Gift Insurance Brokers Limited (trading as Blessed Gift Risk Solutions Co) is a licensed insurance brokerage firm dedicated to providing exceptional risk management and insurance solutions to clients across Nigeria.

With deep roots in the financial services industry and pension fund administration, our leadership brings decades of experience in understanding and protecting the financial well-being of individuals and corporate organizations.

Our Mission: To deliver innovative, client-focused insurance solutions that provide peace of mind and financial security for every stage of life.

Our Vision: To be the most trusted insurance brokerage firm in Nigeria, recognized for integrity, expertise, and unwavering commitment to client satisfaction.

Why Choose Us:

• Licensed and regulated insurance brokerage
• Expertise in pension fund administration
• Independent advice from multiple insurance providers
• Personalized service and dedicated support
• Deep understanding of the Nigerian insurance landscape
• Strategic location in the growing Ibeju-Lekki corridor

At Blessed Gift, we don't just sell insurance policies—we build lasting relationships founded on trust, transparency, and exceptional service delivery.
sections.imagePrompt: Professional Nigerian insurance broker in business attire shaking hands with satisfied client in modern Lagos office, documents and digital tablet on desk, certificates on wall, warm professional lighting, atmosphere of trust and partnership

sections.name: Our Services
sections.copy:
Comprehensive Insurance & Risk Management Solutions

General Insurance
Protect your assets with comprehensive coverage including motor insurance, property insurance, fire and special perils, burglary insurance, goods-in-transit, marine insurance, and engineering insurance. We work with Nigeria's leading underwriters to secure the best rates and coverage for your needs.

Life Assurance
Secure your family's future with life insurance policies, education plans, mortgage protection, critical illness cover, and investment-linked insurance products designed to build wealth while providing protection.

Corporate Insurance Solutions
Tailored insurance packages for businesses including group life assurance, employee compensation insurance (WAPIC), professional indemnity, directors and officers liability, public liability, and comprehensive business protection.

Pension & Retirement Planning
Leveraging our expertise in pension fund administration, we provide strategic guidance on retirement planning, pension transfers, annuities, and long-term wealth accumulation strategies.

Risk Assessment & Management
Comprehensive risk analysis, insurance audits, claims management support, and ongoing policy reviews to ensure your coverage remains optimal as your circumstances evolve.

Insurance Advisory Services
Independent, unbiased advice to help you navigate Nigeria's insurance market, compare policies from multiple providers, and make informed decisions that align with your financial goals.

Every client receives personalized attention and customized solutions. Contact us today for a complimentary insurance review.

sections.name: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.copy:
Your Insurance Questions Answered

What is an insurance broker?
An insurance broker is a licensed professional who acts as your advocate in the insurance market. Unlike agents who represent specific insurance companies, brokers work for you—comparing policies from multiple insurers to find the best coverage at the most competitive rates.

Why should I use Blessed Gift Insurance Brokers?
We provide independent, unbiased advice, access to multiple insurance providers, expert claims support, personalized service, and ongoing policy management. Our expertise in pension administration also gives us unique insights into long-term financial planning.

What types of insurance do you offer?
We broker all classes of insurance including motor, property, life assurance, health, travel, marine, professional indemnity, group life, and specialized corporate insurance solutions.

How much do your services cost?
Our brokerage services are typically commission-based, meaning you pay no additional fees—we're compensated by insurance companies when policies are placed. Our priority is finding you the right coverage, not maximizing commission.

How quickly can I get insurance coverage?
For most policies, we can arrange coverage within 24-48 hours once we have your information and required documentation. Emergency coverage can often be arranged same-day.

Do you handle insurance claims?
Absolutely! We provide dedicated claims support, liaising with insurers on your behalf to ensure smooth, prompt settlement of legitimate claims.

Are you licensed?
Yes, Blessed Gift Insurance Brokers Limited is fully licensed and regulated by relevant Nigerian authorities to operate as an insurance brokerage firm.

Can you help with both personal and business insurance?
Yes, we serve individuals, families, small businesses, and large corporations across all sectors of the Nigerian economy.

Still have questions? Contact us today—we're here to help!
